auth.termsLabel: I have read and agree to the
auth.termsLink: Terms of Service, Privacy and Explicit Consent
auth.termsModalTitle: Terms of Service, Privacy and Explicit Consent
auth.termsModalBody:
Effective Date: 2026-03-28

1) SERVICE SCOPE
PT Mate is software for trainers to manage clients, schedule sessions, track measurements/photos and keep performance notes. It is not a medical diagnosis or treatment tool.

2) ACCOUNT AND USER RESPONSIBILITY
Users are responsible for account security, password confidentiality and all actions performed through their account. In case of suspected unauthorized access, users must immediately change credentials and notify the system administrator.

3) DATA CATEGORIES
The app may process identity/contact information, session records, measurement data, assessment notes and user-uploaded media. Users are responsible for lawfully uploading data and obtaining required permissions/consents.

4) PURPOSE OF PROCESSING
Data is processed to provide the service, improve user experience, perform technical maintenance, ensure security, comply with legal obligations and maintain records.

5) EXPLICIT CONSENT AND SENSITIVE DATA
Before uploading potentially sensitive data (including photos, measurements and health-related information), users confirm that all required explicit consents have been obtained from relevant data subjects. Legal and administrative responsibility for missing/invalid consent remains with the user.

6) RETENTION AND SECURITY
Data is protected using reasonable technical and organizational measures. However, absolute security cannot be guaranteed for internet transmission or digital storage.

7) THIRD-PARTY SERVICES
Infrastructure providers (hosting, database, backup, analytics, etc.) may be used. Such services are subject to their own terms and policies.

8) MEDICAL DISCLAIMER
PT Mate does not provide medical advice. Training and health-related decisions remain the sole responsibility of users and their clients. The service owner is not liable for outcomes caused by misuse or misinterpretation.

9) INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
Software code, interface and brand elements belong to their respective rights holders. Unauthorized copying, reproduction or commercial use is prohibited.

10) SERVICE CHANGES AND TERMINATION
The service owner may update, suspend or terminate the service at any time. Accounts may be suspended in cases of security violations, abuse or unlawful content.

11) LEGAL COMPLIANCE
Users agree to comply with applicable data protection laws (including KVKK/GDPR where relevant). Users are responsible for transparency notices, consent management and data subject request handling when required.

12) LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
The service is provided

. To the maximum extent permitted by law, no liability is accepted for indirect, incidental or consequential damages, including data loss, service interruption or loss of profits.

13) UPDATES AND ACCEPTANCE
This text may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the app constitutes acceptance of the latest version.

By accepting, you declare that you have read, understood and agreed to these terms, privacy provisions and explicit consent/data processing statements.

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.parqHeartProblem: Has your doctor ever said that you have a heart condition or high blood pressure?
assessment.parqChestPain: Do you feel pain in your chest at rest or during exercise?
assessment.parqDizziness: Have you experienced dizziness, loss of balance or consciousness in the last 12 months?
assessment.parqChronicCondition: Have you been diagnosed with any other chronic condition?
assessment.parqMedication: Are you currently taking medication for a chronic condition?
assessment.parqBoneJoint: Do you have a bone, joint, or tissue problem that affects your mobility?
assessment.parqSupervision: Has your doctor said you should only do supervised physical activity?
